posts.title: RecordShield before the job interview
posts.hook: Before the interview, it helps to know what a background check might surface.
posts.body:
Old records and reporting errors can be confusing—especially when you’re applying for a new role. RecordShield (beta) helps you review what may appear in common background check results and organize questions to follow up on.

It’s not legal advice, and it can’t guarantee what an employer will see or decide—but it can give you clearer visibility so you can prepare.
posts.complianceNotes: Avoid implying guaranteed accuracy, complete coverage, expungement/clearing, employer influence, or legal conclusions. Do not suggest eligibility improvements or outcomes. Keep language to “may,” “can help,” “common background check results,” and “organize questions.”
posts.speaker: legalease
posts.creativeBrief: LinkedIn single-image or short motion graphic. Visual: archival paper files/folders transitioning into a clean, minimal “privacy clarity” layout (soft light, neutral tones). Subtle overlays: document edges, redaction bars, magnifying glass icon. Avoid showing specific charges, court seals, government logos, or definitive “cleared/approved” stamps. Include ample negative space for brand mark only (no on-image claims).

wilmaImageWorkflow.imagePrompt: Archival paper and privacy clarity visual.
wilmaImageWorkflow.negativePrompt: No readable text, fake logos, legal guarantees, court victory imagery, mugshots, jail bars, or handcuffs.

posts.title: RecordShield before the job interview
posts.hook: Before the interview, know what a background check may show.
posts.body:
Job searches can move fast—and surprises on a background check can slow things down. RecordShield helps you review the records that may appear, so you can understand what’s there and spot possible errors early.

RecordShield is in beta as part of our launch.
posts.complianceNotes: Avoid implying guaranteed hiring outcomes, clearance, expungement, or legal advice. Do not claim partnerships with employers, agencies, or courts. Use “may/can” language and frame as informational review and error-spotting.
posts.speaker: legalease
posts.creativeBrief: Instagram feed post. Visual theme: archival paper textures + clean “privacy clarity” overlays (soft translucent layers, redaction bars, file-stamp motifs) without using real personal data. Composition: a stack of documents partially obscured by a frosted-glass layer to suggest clarity. Color palette: warm paper tones + cool neutral accents. No on-image promises or outcome language.

wilmaImageWorkflow.imagePrompt: Archival paper and privacy clarity visual.
wilmaImageWorkflow.negativePrompt: No readable text, fake logos, legal guarantees, court victory imagery, mugshots, jail bars, or handcuffs.

posts.title: RecordShield before the job interview
posts.hook: Before the interview, it helps to know what a background check might show.
posts.body:
Surprises in a record report can create stress at the worst time. RecordShield helps you review what may appear—so you can understand it and decide your next steps with more clarity.

RecordShield is a self-check tool, not legal advice, and results can vary.
posts.complianceNotes: Avoid implying the tool prevents rejection or guarantees hiring. Avoid “clear your record,” “pass a background check,” or any court/agency references. Keep language informational; include disclaimer that it’s not legal advice and results vary.
posts.speaker: legalease
posts.creativeBrief: Facebook Page post. Visual: archival paper texture (files/records vibe) with a clean, modern overlay suggesting “privacy clarity” (soft translucent panels, subtle lock or shield icon). Muted palette (warm off-white, charcoal, calm blue). No text on image. Consider a simple desk scene: folder edges + a privacy screen motif.

wilmaImageWorkflow.imagePrompt: Archival paper and privacy clarity visual.
wilmaImageWorkflow.negativePrompt: No readable text, fake logos, legal guarantees, court victory imagery, mugshots, jail bars, or handcuffs.

library.title: Policy tension hook
library.body: A law can sound neutral on paper and still crush the person with the least room to maneuver.

library.title: Movement CTA
library.body: Make second chances easier to find, understand, and act on.

library.title: No legal advice
library.body: Do not promise eligibility, outcomes, record clearing, or agency action. Use educational language.

library.title: Narrative Infrastructure / Implementation Layer
library.body: The front door is broken. Approved design-language reference: assets/brand/examples/narrative-infrastructure-implementation-layer.png. Use its editorial poster energy, oversized type, square-frame crop language, route lines, checkpoint labels, paper texture, Legal Blue dominance, and Horizon Orange signal path. Do not copy the person, race, gender, headline, or exact layout.

library.title: Narrative Infrastructure / Human Cost
library.body: A record can outlast the sentence. Editorial human crop with system barriers and status labels around the person. Dignified, not pity-driven.

library.title: Narrative Infrastructure / Workforce Argument
library.body: Record clearance is a workforce issue. Stat poster with hiring pathway, background-check checkpoint, economic mobility line, and one clean takeaway.

library.title: Narrative Infrastructure / Trust & Guidance
library.body: Wilma translation: paperwork should not require a secret decoder ring. Wilma in a framed guide window connected to a plain-English definition panel.

library.title: Narrative Infrastructure / Community Infrastructure
library.body: Second chances need infrastructure. Neighborhood systems collage showing clinic, intake, screening, and follow-up as connected service nodes.

settings.brandVoice: Conversational, direct, founder-led, emotionally grounded. Intelligent but accessible. Avoid generic marketing copy and legal advice.
settings.wilmaVoice: Warm and clear with light personality. Plain-English guide for record clearance. Helpful, grounded, direct, occasionally witty. Never a lawyer, chatbot, motivational speaker, or cartoon mascot.

brandAssets.name: Wilma canonical pose: confident arms crossed

ruleJson.summary: LegalEase visual style is the Techno Afro-Futurist Concept system: semi-abstract modern techno imagery with Afro-futurist inspiration, luminous pathways, human dignity, cultural geometry, data constellations, square/portal frames, deep Legal Blue atmosphere, and Horizon Orange signal energy. Do not render logos, Wilma, or readable text in generated raster art.

banned: smiling stock-photo people with color overlays
headline at top plus illustration in middle plus logo bottom right
stereotype shorthand for race, gender, class, or legal status
implying a person shown has a criminal record without approved context

ruleJson.summary: LegalEase is the institution for systems, policy, workforce, AI, funders, and partners. Wilma is the plain-English guide for consumers, FAQs, myths, process explainers, Facebook, Instagram, and Threads. Use both for complex topics.

ruleJson.hardRule: Consumer-facing eligibility, paperwork, process, record-clearance, or expungement posts must pass the Wilma compliance gate before scoring.
forbidden: you do not need a lawyer
this will get you a job
approvedLanguage: rules vary by state and case
a court makes the final decision

ruleJson.hardRule: Show simple labels only: Strong, Needs rewrite, Rejected.

generationProfiles.promptTemplate: Create a Techno Afro-Futurist Concept image: semi-abstract, modern, luminous, symbolic, with negative space for app-rendered text. Use route-light geometry, blank panels, and future-facing civic signal energy.
generationProfiles.negativeRules: No generic quote-card template, no tiny text, no fake court outcomes, no cliché legal props, no giant logo badge, no centered Canva layout.

generationProfiles.promptTemplate: Create a Techno Afro-Futurist Concept Wilma Guide background. Do not draw Wilma. Leave a calm guide-panel zone for app-composited canonical Wilma. Use luminous routes, blank guide panels, and calm signal geometry.
generationProfiles.negativeRules: No generic assistant character, no photoreal Wilma, no anime style, no flat cartoon style, do not remove headset or change orange irises, no giant Wilma dominating the whole composition.

generationProfiles.promptTemplate: Create a Techno Afro-Futurist Concept image about systems, access, and practical next steps. Combine abstract human dignity, route-light logic, blank document planes, data constellations, and square/portal frame structures.
generationProfiles.negativeRules: No generic flat vector people, no exaggerated criminal imagery, no mugshots, no offensive stereotypes, no fake legal promises, no nonprofit infographic look.

generationProfiles.promptTemplate: Create a Techno Afro-Futurist Concept carousel cover background with one clear visual metaphor, blank overlay zones, luminous path logic, square/portal modules, and futuristic civic clarity.
generationProfiles.negativeRules: No dense copy, no tiny slide text, no fake filing instructions, no guaranteed outcomes, no generic process-arrow infographic.

generationProfiles.promptTemplate: Create a respectful Techno Afro-Futurist Concept human-stakes image: dignified portrait energy or grounded human detail with abstract luminous barriers, protective frames, future-memory atmosphere, and no testimonial implication.
generationProfiles.negativeRules: No mugshots, jail bars, handcuffs, shame imagery, fake before/after story, smiling stock-photo overlay, or exploitative criminal justice visuals.

generationProfiles.promptTemplate: Create a Techno Afro-Futurist Concept data/mobility image with abstract chart fragments, orbital nodes, luminous trajectory lines, blank data panels, and workforce/economic mobility cues without readable numbers.
generationProfiles.negativeRules: No unsourced statistics, no cluttered dashboards, no decorative chart junk, no job or housing outcome promises, no generic business infographic.

generationProfiles.promptTemplate: Create a Techno Afro-Futurist Concept product-systems image with humane automation cues, blank interface planes, routing grids, signal processing, and document-like translucent layers.
generationProfiles.negativeRules: No generic AI robot imagery, no futuristic blue holograms, no fake user data, no legal outcome claims, no random SaaS dashboard.

generationProfiles.promptTemplate: Create a Techno Afro-Futurist Concept short-video opening frame: one strong abstract visual metaphor, luminous motion cues, blank panels, signal paths, and no readable generated text.
generationProfiles.negativeRules: No cluttered storyboard, no unreadable captions, no sensational criminal imagery, no guaranteed outcomes, no generic vertical-template look.

pilots.objective: Test whether LegalEase can route resident inquiries into clearer next steps and reduce staff triage burden.

pilots.nextAction: Hold kickoff and confirm first referral batch.
pilots.expansionPath: If 100 residents are routed cleanly, expand to a 90-day resident services pilot.

pilots.expansionPath: Expand into county resident services dashboard if the first month proves demand.

pilots.nextBestAction: Ask for decision date and approval to publish pilot scope if accepted.

pilots.objective: Identify where policy change does not translate into resident understanding or action.
pilots.successMetrics: Partner-approved notification workflow, 200 RecordShield starts, public learning memo.
pilots.nextAction: Present narrow pilot scope in second meeting.
pilots.expansionPath: If notification-gap framing resonates, package into a national partner dashboard.
pilots.notes: Best strategic fit for infrastructure positioning.
pilots.nextBestAction: Present narrow pilot scope in second meeting.

complianceItems.issueSummary: Avoid eligibility, outcome, and court-result promises.
complianceItems.requiredDisclaimer: General information only. Rules vary by state and case. A court makes the final decision.
complianceItems.approvalNotes: Approved with plain-English disclaimer and no outcome language.
complianceItems.notes: Investor demo should show compliance as a launch gate.

complianceItems.issueSummary: Must distinguish voting/civic access copy from legal advice.
complianceItems.requiredDisclaimer: Legal information only, not legal advice. Eligibility and court outcomes are not guaranteed.
complianceItems.approvalNotes: Use partner-safe language and no guarantee claims.
complianceItems.notes: Ready for launch with approved wording.

soc2Policies.summary: LegalEase protects operational, partner, and sensitive legal workflow data by limiting access, keeping secrets server-side, reviewing vendors, and logging sensitive changes.
Access is granted by business need, reviewed regularly, and removed when no longer required. Service keys stay server-side.
AI drafts, prompts, outputs, and automation suggestions require human approval before external use; high-risk legal content routes through compliance review.

contentBank.title: Clean Slate is infrastructure
contentBank.rawIdea: Explain why policy is only step one and implementation is the next phase.

contentBank.title: RecordShield before the job interview
contentBank.rawIdea: Show why people need clarity before a background check blocks an opportunity.

contentBank.title: Partner campaigns need tracking

contentBank.creativeDirection: Neo-brutalist launch gate visual.

contentBank.title: County pilots need a small wedge
contentBank.rawIdea: Explain why a 30-day backlog triage pilot is easier to approve than a giant transformation project.
contentBank.creativeDirection: County service pathway as clean modular system.

contentBank.title: Fresh Start Campaign launch

contentBank.creativeDirection: Data as physical proof blocks.

contentBank.rawIdea: Show why careful claims make partner distribution safer and more scalable.
contentBank.creativeDirection: Museum minimal object with approval gate.

contentBank.title: What partners actually need
contentBank.rawIdea: Partners do not need another brochure; they need a simple campaign they can send.
contentBank.creativeDirection: Documentary graphic collaboration table.

contentBank.title: The dashboard is proof
contentBank.rawIdea: Investor-ready infrastructure means showing pilots, users, conversion, and compliance in one operating layer.
contentBank.creativeDirection: Product system visual without fake UI text.

contentBank.title: Second chances need operations
contentBank.rawIdea: Human impact happens when forms, staff, and follow-up are coordinated.
contentBank.creativeDirection: Grounded kitchen-table document scene.

contentBank.title: No fake legal promises
contentBank.rawIdea: Explain why LegalEase avoids eligibility guarantees and outcome promises.
contentBank.creativeDirection: Wilma guide environment with calm warning space.

contentBank.title: RecordShield as the front door
contentBank.rawIdea: Position RecordShield as the low-friction entry point into the LegalEase ecosystem.
contentBank.creativeDirection: Minimal premium front-door metaphor.

contentBank.title: Partner proof beats pitch decks
contentBank.rawIdea: A live campaign with tracked users says more than a slide about market size.
contentBank.creativeDirection: Data room sculpture with partner proof artifact.

contentBank.title: Ask Wilma: What should I check first?
contentBank.rawIdea: Wilma explains the first safe step without legal advice.
contentBank.creativeDirection: Reserved Wilma stage with blank cards.

contentBank.title: Why active campaigns matter
contentBank.rawIdea: Ten partner campaigns creates distribution proof across multiple channels.
contentBank.creativeDirection: Campaign energy with restrained color blocking.

contentBank.title: Follow-up is the operating system
contentBank.rawIdea: The company wins when every partner has a next action and owner.
contentBank.creativeDirection: Cinematic operator desk with action cards.

contentBank.title: The compliance memo is not paperwork
contentBank.rawIdea: Compliance artifacts reduce risk for partners, investors, and acquirers.
contentBank.creativeDirection: Archival futurism compliance folder.

contentBank.title: RecordShield users are the signal
contentBank.rawIdea: A thousand users with source attribution creates a measurable acquisition funnel.
contentBank.creativeDirection: Data as sculpture with source channels.

contentBank.rawIdea: Ask a successful partner for a quote or public case study after measurable usage.
contentBank.creativeDirection: Museum campaign minimal testimonial placeholder with no text.

contentBank.title: Campaigns need staff language
contentBank.rawIdea: Partner staff need one sentence they can repeat to send people to RecordShield.

contentBank.title: The first 25 users matter
contentBank.rawIdea: A pilot becomes real when the first 25 people move through the funnel.
contentBank.creativeDirection: Physical milestone blocks, no numbers or text.
